\tzpentry{ID3506}{Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3506 introduces Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \mathcal{E}^{(u)} = n_\mu n_\nu T^{\mu\nu}\big|_{n\to u},\quad S_i^{(u)} = -h_{i\mu}u_\nu T^{\mu\nu},\quad S_{ij}^{(u)} = h_{i\mu}h_{j\nu}T^{\mu\nu}. \]
